name: Rhamondre Stevenson
headline: Bruising back rebounds on efficiency, mid-range RB2 value
body:
Stevenson bounced back in 2025 despite playing 14 games, climbing to 146.8 fantasy points (RB25) on far better per-touch work: 4.64 yards per carry versus 3.87 in 2024, with explosive-run rate up to 11.54 percent and 2.77 yards after contact. He forced a broken tackle every 8.1 carries (16 total) and scored a career-best seven rushing plus two receiving touchdowns, while adding 32 catches for 345 yards at 10.78 per reception. His 31 red-zone opportunities and 11 goal-line carries underline genuine scoring equity.

The 2021 fourth-rounder (Pick 120, Oklahoma) remains New England's lead back, though three fumbles and a -0.044 EPA per play keep him short of elite, and added backfield competition could trim the workload. With a three-down role, goal-line work and PPR usage intact, his volume floor and touchdown upside make him a back-end RB2 with weekly-starter weeks. Target him in the RB20-25 range as a stable, if unspectacular, contributor.
